sections.paragraph:
Original: אנחרת

Transliteration: 'ănâchărâth

Phonetic: an-aw-kha-rawth'

BDB Definition:

Anaharath = "the groaning of fear"
  1. (BDB) city in Naphtali
  2. (CLBL) city in Issachar

Origin: probably from the same root as H5170

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
